title: [Synth] Use truth table merging for cut computation
body:
Replace simulation-based cut truth-table computation with incremental truth-table merging over operand cuts in the merged input space.

This is necessary for Choice support, where copied cuts must preserve the selected operand cut's leaf set instead of being resimulated through one concrete IR path.

Move the input-space expansion helper into Support and add unit tests for the shared truth-table expansion logic.

AI-Assited-by: Codex 5.3
